---
title: "Study progress"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


## Wave 3 Progress

* Families who have completed both questionnaires: **64**

* Families who have sent us all videos: **50**

The prize draw winner for January has been notified.

The next draw will be on **30th March.**

We have started interviewing caregivers about their experiences as an extra optional part of our Wave 3 data collection. 

* Interviews so far:  **9**
